_description: Low-confidence scenario: nonexistent scopePath causes impact_query to return partial graph data (graphConfidence < 1.0, recommendedAgentUse degrades below 'lead-direct'). lineage/caps/risks/evals all excluded so only applicationState + retrievalContext + impactContext + derived fields are present. Note: impact_query degrades gracefully — it does NOT throw on missing nodes. The key invariant is graphConfidence < 1.0 and recommendedAgentUse != 'lead-direct' (it may be 'targeted-verification' or 'bounded-explorer' depending on graph state).
